summary: Phase B (Gemini Live + pronunciation + mode picker) full test. Created /app/backend/tests/test_phase_b_live.py with 5 tests covering pronunciation endpoint shape/auth and WS handshake (valid token + invalid token + unknown session). All 5 Phase B + 23 regression tests PASS (28/28). Backend logs show no startup ERRORs, streak_reset_loop task created on @app.on_event('startup'). Frontend e2e via Playwright: login -> dashboard-mode-picker visible, mode-live sets localStorage englearn_call_mode='live', scenario card -> /live/{id}; LiveCall page exposes livecall-orb, livecall-start, livecall-back, livecall-transcript-link; clicking start triggers WS attempt with 0 JS pageerrors (mic denial handled gracefully -> 'CALL ENDED' state). Switching back to mode-classic routes scenario to /call/{id}. Both modes verified.
critical_code_review_comments: WS route /api/ws/maya/{session_id} correctly handles invalid token + unknown session with structured {type:'error', message:...} payloads and clean close (verified).
POST /api/pronunciation returns {word, tip, score} with score in 0-100 range. Could optionally add input length validation (very long text) but not blocking.
Frontend Dashboard mode picker correctly persists choice via localStorage 'englearn_call_mode' and conditionally routes scenario click to /live/:id vs /call/:id.
LiveCall page handles getUserMedia denial gracefully -> shows 'CALL ENDED' state without throwing uncaught JS exceptions; useLiveAudio cleanly aborts.
test_credentials: test@englearn.ai / pass1234 (existing seeded user); Phase B tests also create fresh users via /auth/signup
seed_data_creation: Each test creates fresh users via /auth/signup; no DB mutation required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. All 28 tests pass in ~12s. test_phase_b_live.py covers pronunciation + WS. For UI testing, pre-set localStorage 'englearn_onboarded_v1'='1' before navigating to /dashboard to skip the onboarding overlay that otherwise blocks scenario card clicks.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial Playwright run failed because Onboarding overlay (data-testid='onboarding-overlay') with skip button data-testid='onboarding-skip' intercepts pointer events on first visit. Workaround: set localStorage key 'englearn_onboarded_v1'='1' before login OR click onboarding-skip. Not a product bug.
